message.content:
This is a screenshot of an Arabic-language website with a formal, institutional design style, likely for an award or volunteer service organization. The layout follows a vertical, RTL (Right-to-Left) direction typical of Arabic web design, with content flowing from right to left.

**Header Section:**
- Top-right corner contains a logo with text "AL HUSSEIN BIN ABDULLAH II AWARD FOR VOLUNTARY SERVICE" in both Arabic and English
- Navigation menu with 6 items in Arabic: "الرئيسية" (Home), "عن الجائزة" (About the Award), "الفئات والشروط" (Categories and Conditions), "الفعاليات" (Events), "الشركاء" (Partners), "الجائزة الدولية" (International Award)
- A brown button with "اللغة العربية" (Arabic Language) and a globe icon on the left side
- Background image shows people in uniform and a man speaking, with an overlaid quote in Arabic about volunteer service

**News/Announcements Section:**
- Three news items with dates (all 2025) displayed horizontally
- Each item has a date, title, and brief description in Arabic
- Right side has a "أخبار" (News) heading with navigation arrows and numbered tabs (01, 02, 03) for pagination

**Main Content Area:**
- Large image showing a group of people (likely award recipients) on a stage
- Right side has "من نحن" (About Us) section with numbered tabs and a "اقرأ المزيد" (Read More) button

**Award Categories Section:**
- Heading "فئات الجائزة" (Award Categories) with subtitle about encouraging volunteer work
- Four white cards in a row, each with:
  - Gold trophy icon
  - Category title in Arabic
  - Description text
  - "اقرأ المزيد" (Read More) link
- Categories appear to be different types of volunteer awards

**Volunteer Fields Section:**
- Dark green background with heading "مجالات العمل التطوعي" (Volunteer Work Fields)
- Seven icons with labels representing different volunteer sectors (health, education, environment, etc.)

**Process/Steps Section:**
- Light background with circular step indicators showing a process flow
- Four main steps with icons and Arabic descriptions
- Connecting lines between steps showing progression

**Footer:**
- Dark background with social media icons (YouTube, LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter)
- Multiple columns of links including "اتصل بنا" (Contact Us), "سياسة الخصوصية" (Privacy Policy), etc.
- Copyright notice at bottom right: "جميع الحقوق محفوظة © 2024 جائزة الحسين بن عبد الله الثاني للعمل التطوعي" (All rights reserved © 2024 Al Hussein Bin Abdullah II Award for Voluntary Service)

The color scheme uses earth tones (browns, greens) with white backgrounds for content areas, creating a professional and trustworthy appearance suitable for an award organization. The design is clean and structured with clear visual hierarchy, using icons and images to enhance the content.
